description: IPC granted to the live web app over HTTPS. The remote page is treated as semi-trusted (assume MITM/compromise risk), so it is granted ONLY the non-privileged runtime-info command plus the core baseline needed for IPC. The privileged commands (OS keyring secrets, offline cache, speaking-audio temp files, dropped-file probing, notifications, open-external) are deliberately NOT granted to the remote origin — they stay registered for localhost/dev and future native re-enablement. Re-add the matching allow-* here only if a feature is moved to native desktop capture.
